changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: --Dear Rena.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: How are you? ...That's kind of a weird way to start, sorry.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Did you sleep well last night?@k@vS20/03/440300207. Believe it or not, I got thrown in there myself once, a long time ago.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I hear they put in air conditioning recently, but when I was there, the air was stagnant and it was like a steam bath--so unbearably hot!@k@vS20/03/440300209. And the blanket smelled really weird too...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Is your room okay?@k@vS20/03/440300211. If there's anything you don't like, don't hold back--just speak up about it.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Even if they give you a sour face, don't worry!@k@vS20/03/440300213. Just say 'Get me my lawyer!' and they'll give you whatever you want!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Hey.@k@vS20/03/440300215. Things might be rough for a while, but keep your chin up, okay?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Knowing you, Rena, you're probably feeling down, thinking you caused us all kinds of trouble... but we're totally fine, not bothered at all!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: More than anything, what makes us happiest is that you've come back to being the kind, gentle Rena we know.@k@vS20/03/440300218. Kei-chan, Satoko, Rika-chan.@k@vS20/03/440300219. ...And of course, me too.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: We are precious 'friends'--not a single one of us can be replaced by anyone else in the entire world.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Everyone has secrets they can't share, and worrying and suffering over them... might even make you sick sometimes.@k@vS20/03/440300222. But, Rena.@k@vS20/03/440300223. ...There's just one thing, one single thing I want you to promise me from now on.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: When that happens, please... believe in us, okay?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: No matter how terrible the problem you're facing.@k@vS20/03/440300226. Even if banding together alone isn't enough to fix it.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: We will all be on your side, until the very end.@k@vS20/03/440300228. That much I promise absolutely, even if I have to stake my life on it.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: So let's share the painful things and the sad things... together.@k@vS20/03/440300230. Being relied on isn't a burden.@k@vS20/03/440300231. I know that someday--no, even up until now, I've been in the opposite position and caused trouble for others too.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: So if... you still consider us your friends going forward,@k@vS20/03/440300233. don't you dare hold back next time you're in trouble.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Nothing could be more painful than the regret of not noticing a friend's suffering and being unable to do anything about it...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Oh, by the way--how were the rice balls we brought?@k@vS20/03/440300236. Did you eat them all already?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: You probably already figured this out, but every club member helped make those rice balls.@k@vS20/03/440300238. Even clumsy old Kei-chan!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: So here's your homework for next time we meet:@k@vS20/03/440300240. figure out which rice ball each of us made.@k@vS20/03/440300241. If you can't guess them all, it's penalty game time, naturally!@k@vS20/03/440300242. ...Well, Kei-chan's should be obvious at a glance, though~
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: --Tomorrow, I'll prepare even more food and bring it to you.@k@vS20/03/440300245. Even after you're transferred to Gogura, we'll all come visit as often as we possibly can.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Rena, you are our--no, my precious friend and companion.@k@vS20/03/440300247. I'll be waiting for the day everything goes back to normal.@k@vS20/03/440300248. Forever and always, I'll be waiting.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
